summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZentraQR BackofficePage refactoring with new secure authentication system. All backend authentication endpoints working correctly, frontend login/logout functionality operational, and navigation between dashboard tabs successful.

minor_issues.issue: Page header text selector may not match exactly ('Gestão de Restaurantes' vs 'Restaurantes')

passed_tests: Backend: Protected routes accessible after auth (pricing, restaurants)
Backend: Protected routes blocked after logout
Frontend: Login page renders with proper ZentraQR branding
Frontend: Password input and login button functional
Frontend: Successful login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard displays correctly with navigation sidebar
Frontend: Navigation tabs work (Dashboard, Contacts, Clients, Restaurants, Launch, Emails)
Frontend: Logout redirects to homepage correctly
